description.zh-cn: 虚拟商品自动发货：为指定 SKU 配置卡密池或固定内容(下载链接/兑换码)，订单支付成功后自动发放并站内信通知，支持卡密批量导入与发放记录、库存告警。
description.en: Auto-delivery for virtual goods: configure a card-key pool or fixed content (download link/code) per SKU; on payment success the system delivers automatically and notifies the buyer, with bulk import, delivery logs and low-stock awareness.
